title: frangula henryi
intro: Frangula henryi, also known as Chinese buckthorn or Rhamnus henryi, is a small shrub native to China and parts of Asia, belonging to the family Rhamnaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anthraquinones, a group of compounds that have laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Frangula henryi include its ability to aid digestion, relieve constipation, and support liver health, making it a popular remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. Frangula henryi can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed under the guidance of a healthcare professional to harness its medicinal properties.
